zh-CN.name: 字母Z
zh-CN.intro: 字母Z是英文字母中的最后一个，长得像一条小小的闪电，也像数字2在睡觉。宝宝，你也可以画出这个有趣的字母哦！

story.title: ⚡字母Z的冒险
story.body: 字母Z是字母表里最小的弟弟，它排在最后一位。虽然最小，但Z可厉害啦！它住在一个大大的动物园里，那里有斑马（Zebra）、斑胸草雀（Zebra Finch），还有一道道闪电（Zigzag）划过天空。有一次，Z想去找朋友们玩，它走呀走，先遇到了A，A说：“Z，你总是最后一个，但我最喜欢和你玩！”然后遇到B，B说：“Z，你的形状像小闪电，跑起来肯定很快！”Z笑着说：“我虽然小，但我能发出‘滋滋’的声音，像小蜜蜂一样！”字母们一起唱歌跳舞，Z用它的‘滋滋’声给歌曲伴奏，大家都说好听极了。从此，Z再也不觉得自己排在最后不好了，因为它知道，每个字母都有自己的超级本领！

knowledge.title: 字母Z是怎么来的？
knowledge.body: 很久很久以前，字母Z的形状来自希腊字母Zeta，它代表一个声音。后来英国人觉得Z用得少，差点把它从字母表里去掉呢！幸好Z留了下来，变成了我们今天喜欢的闪电形状。

en.name: Letter Z
en.intro: Letter Z is the last letter of the alphabet. It looks like a little lightning bolt, or like a number 2 that is sleeping. Can you draw a zigzag like Z?

story.title: ⚡The Adventure of Letter Z
story.body: Letter Z is the youngest brother in the alphabet family, always standing at the very end. Even though he is small, Z is very special! He lives in a big zoo with zebras, colorful finches, and zigzag lightning in the sky. One day, Z decided to visit his letter friends. He walked and walked, first meeting A, who said, 'Z, you are always the last one, but I love playing with you the most!' Then B said, 'Z, your shape is like a tiny lightning bolt, you must be very fast!' Z smiled and said, 'I may be small, but I can buzz like a busy bee—zzz, zzz!' All the letters danced and sang together, and Z added his buzzing sound to the music. Everyone cheered because it was so much fun! From that day on, Z never felt sad about being last, because he knew every letter has a super power of its own!

knowledge.title: Where did Letter Z come from?
knowledge.body: A long, long time ago, the shape of Z came from the Greek letter Zeta, which made a buzzing sound. Later, English speakers almost removed it from the alphabet because they rarely used it. Lucky for us, Z stayed and became the cool lightning‐bolt letter we love today!
